hooks.command: input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; jq -nc '{decision:"block",reason:"This session changed files. Before ending, reconcile GitHub issues so nothing is lost: if you finished or merged work, confirm the source issue is closed-as-complete or has tracked follow-ups for anything deferred, and file a GitHub issue for any defect or gap you discovered while implementing (do not leave it only in chat). Separately, if the task was meaningful, consider running /retro for a short 4-Ls note in retros/inbox/. If none of this applies or you have already handled it, reply in one line and end your turn."}'

jq -c 'if (.tool_name == "mcp__github__merge_pull_request") or (.tool_name == "mcp__github__update_pull_request" and .tool_input.state == "closed") then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "ask", permissionDecisionReason: "Closing or merging a PR is irreversible and outward-facing. Confirm this was explicitly requested and is not a batched or speculative action."}} else empty end'
